arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag still risks Man Utd sack despite Southampton win
arts.sum: Britain’s bookmakers expect Ten Hag to be sacked sooner rather than later, with the Manchester United boss the favourite to be the next Premier League manager to be sacked. Erik ten Hag is still at risk of the Manchester United sack, despite the win against Southampton at the weekend, according to GiveMeSport.

arts.ttl: Southampton star breaks unwanted Premier League record after Man United defeat
arts.sum: Southampton forward Ben Brereton Diaz holds an unwanted Premier League record following the Saints' 3-0 defeat to Manchester United on Saturday afternoon.
